reason: Verified that the agent can successfully execute browser operations, navigate to a URL, extract the page title, and report it back correctly.
steps: Navigated to http://localhost:47891 - Page loaded successfully showing Super Agent application with agent list in sidebar.
Clicked on "QA-20260319-004010-snhx" agent in the sidebar - Agent opened successfully, displaying chat interface with message input field.
Typed message "Open a browser and go to https://example.com. Tell me the page title." into the input field - Message appeared correctly in the textbox.
Clicked the send button to submit the message - Message was sent, agent status changed to "working", and execution began.
Waited up to 3 minutes for agent response - Agent completed execution in 16 seconds with full response.

Verified response mentions "Example Domain" - Response clearly displays: "The page title is Example Domain. It's the classic IANA example domain page with a "Learn more" link." All browser tool calls (Open Browser, Page Snapshot, Browser Command, Close Browser) completed successfully as indicated by green checkmarks.
